节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Providers interfaces to creat a {@link KVManager} instance.
Provides configuration information for {@link KVManager} instances, including the caller's package name and distributed network type.
Indicates the user information
Indicates the bundleName

Manages user information.

This class provides methods for obtaining the user ID and type, setting the user ID and type, and checking whether two users are the same.
Indicates the user ID to set
Indicates the user type to set
Enumerates user types.
Indicates a user that logs in to different devices using the same account.
KVStore constants
max key length.
max value length.
max device coordinate key length.
max store id length.
max query length.
max batch operation size.

Indicates the {@code ValueType}.

{@code ValueType} is obtained based on the value.
Indicates that the value type is string.
Indicates that the value type is int.
Indicates that the value type is float.
Indicates that the value type is byte array.
Indicates that the value type is boolean.
Indicates that the value type is double.
Obtains {@code Value} objects stored in a {@link KVStore} database.
Indicates value type
Indicates value
Provides key-value pairs stored in the distributed database.
Indicates key
Indicates value

Receives notifications of all data changes, including data insertion, update, and deletion.

If you have subscribed to {@code KVStore}, you will receive data change notifications and obtain the changed data from the parameters in callback methods upon data insertion, update, or deletion.
Indicates data addition records.
Indicates data update records.
Indicates data deletion records.
Indicates from device id.
Indicates the database synchronization mode.
Indicates that data is only pulled from the remote end.
Indicates that data is only pushed from the local end.
Indicates that data is pushed from the local end, and then pulled from the remote end.
Describes the subscription type.
Subscription to local data changes
Subscription to remote data changes
Subscription to both local and remote data changes
Describes the KVStore type.
Device-collaboration database, as specified by {@code DeviceKVStore}
Single-version database, as specified by {@code SingleKVStore}
Multi-version database, as specified by {@code MultiKVStore}
Describes the KVStore security level.
NO_LEVEL: mains not set the security level.
S0: mains the db is public. There is no impact even if the data is leaked.
S1: mains the db is low level security There are some low impact, when the data is leaked.
S2: mains the db is middle level security There are some major impact, when the data is leaked.
S3: mains the db is high level security There are some severity impact, when the data is leaked.
S4: mains the db is critical level security There are some critical impact, when the data is leaked.

Provides configuration options for creating a {@code KVStore}.

You can determine whether to create another database if a {@code KVStore} database is missing, whether to encrypt the database, and the database type.
Indicates whether to create a database when the database file does not exist
Indicates setting whether database files are encrypted
Indicates setting whether to back up database files
Indicates setting whether database files are automatically synchronized
Indicates setting the database type
Indicates setting the database security level
Indicates schema object
Represents the database schema. You can create Schema objects and put them in Options when creating or opening the database.
A constructor used to create a Schema instance.
Indicates the root json object.
Indicates the string array of json.
Indicates the mode of schema.
Indicates the skip size of schema.

Represents a node of a {@link Schema} instance.

Through the {@link Schema} instance, you can define the fields contained in the values stored in a database.

A FieldNode of the {@link Schema} instance is either a leaf or a non-leaf node.

The leaf node must have a value; the non-leaf node must have a child {@code FieldNode}.
A constructor used to create a FieldNode instance with the specified field. name Indicates the field node name.

Adds a child node to this {@code FieldNode}.

Adding a child node makes this node a non-leaf node. Field value will be ignored if it has child node.
注释信息: @param child The field node to append.
@returns Returns true if the child node is successfully added to this {@code FieldNode}; returns false otherwise.

parameters.说明: The field node to append.

节点.return_description: Returns true if the child node is successfully added to this {@code FieldNode}; returns false otherwise.

节点.功能描述: Indicates the default value of field node.
Indicates the nullable of database field.
Indicates the type of value.

Provide methods to obtain the result set of the {@code KvStore} database.

The result set is created by using the {@code getResultSet} method in the {@code DeviceKVStore} class. This interface also provides methods for moving the data read position in the result set.
Obtains the number of lines in a result set.
节点.return_description: Returns the number of lines.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the current read position in a result set.
注释信息: @returns Returns the current read position. The read position starts with 0.
节点.return_description: Returns the current read position. The read position starts with 0.

节点.功能描述:
Moves the read position to the first line.

If the result set is empty, false is returned.
注释信息: @returns Returns true if the operation succeeds; return false otherwise.
节点.return_description: Returns true if the operation succeeds; return false otherwise.

节点.功能描述:
Moves the read position to the last line.

If the result set is empty, false is returned.
注释信息: @returns Returns true if the operation succeeds; return false otherwise.
节点.return_description: Returns true if the operation succeeds; return false otherwise.

节点.功能描述:
Moves the read position to the next line.

If the result set is empty or the data in the last line is being read, false is returned.
注释信息: @returns Returns true if the operation succeeds; return false otherwise.
节点.return_description: Returns true if the operation succeeds; return false otherwise.

节点.功能描述:
Moves the read position to the previous line.

If the result set is empty or the data in the first line is being read, false is returned.
注释信息: @returns Returns true if the operation succeeds; return false otherwise.
节点.return_description: Returns true if the operation succeeds; return false otherwise.

节点.功能描述: Moves the read position by a relative offset to the current position. positive offset indicates moving forwards. For example, if the current position is entry 1 and this offset is 2, the destination position will be entry 3; if the current position is entry 3 and this offset is -2, the destination position will be entry 1. The valid final position after moving forwards starts with 0. If the final position is invalid, false will be returned.
注释信息: @param offset Indicates the relative offset to the current position. A negative offset indicates moving backwards, and a
@returns Returns true if the operation succeeds; return false otherwise.

parameters.说明: Indicates the relative offset to the current position. A negative offset indicates moving backwards, and a

节点.return_description: Returns true if the operation succeeds; return false otherwise.

节点.功能描述: Moves the read position from 0 to an absolute position.
注释信息: @returns Returns true if the operation succeeds; return false otherwise.

parameters.说明: Indicates the absolute position.

节点.return_description: Returns true if the operation succeeds; return false otherwise.

节点.功能描述: Checks whether the read position is the first line.
注释信息: @returns Returns true if the read position is the first line; returns false otherwise.
节点.return_description: Returns true if the read position is the first line; returns false otherwise.

节点.return_description: Returns true if the read position is the last line; returns false otherwise.

节点.功能描述:
Represents a database query using a predicate.

This class provides a constructor used to create a {@code Query} instance, which is used to query data matching specified conditions in the database.

This class also provides methods for adding predicates to the {@code Query} instance.

Resets this {@code Query} object.
节点.return_description: Returns the reset {@code Query} object.

节点.功能描述:
Represents a key-value distributed database and provides methods for adding, deleting, modifying, querying, and subscribing to distributed data.

You can create distributed databases of different types by {@link KVManager#getKVStore (Options, String)} with input parameter {@code Options}. Distributed database types are defined in {@code KVStoreType}, including {@code SingleKVStore}.

Writes a key-value pair of the string type into the {@code KvStore} database.

If you do not want to synchronize this key-value pair to other devices, set the write option in the local database. Spaces before and after the key will be cleared. occurs: {@code SERVER_UNAVAILABLE}, {@code IPC_ERROR}, and {@code DB_ERROR}.
注释信息: @param key Indicates the key. The length must be less than {@code MAX_KEY_LENGTH}.
@param value Indicates the string value, which must be less than 4 MB as a UTF-8 byte array.
@throws Throws this exception if any of the following errors

parameters.说明: Indicates the key. The length must be less than {@code MAX_KEY_LENGTH}.
Indicates the string value, which must be less than 4 MB as a UTF-8 byte array.

节点.功能描述:

注释信息: @param key Indicates the key. The length must be less than {@code MAX_KEY_LENGTH}.

节点.功能描述:
Provides methods related to single-version distributed databases.

To create a {@code SingleKVStore} database, you can use the {@link data.distributed.common.KVManager#getKVStore​(Options, String)} method with {@code KVStoreType} set to {@code SINGLE_VERSION} for the input parameter {@code Options}. This database synchronizes data to other databases in time sequence. The {@code SingleKVStore} database does not support synchronous transactions, or data search using snapshots.
Obtains the {@code String} value of a specified key. {@code SERVER_UNAVAILABLE}, {@code IPC_ERROR}, {@code DB_ERROR}, and {@code KEY_NOT_FOUND}.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the result sets with a specified prefix from a {@code KvStore} database. The {@code KvStoreResultSet} object can be used to query all key-value pairs that meet the search criteria. Each {@code KvStore} instance can have a maximum of four {@code KvStoreResultSet} objects at the same time. If you have created four objects, calling this method will return a failure. Therefore, you are advised to call the closeResultSet method to close unnecessary {@code KvStoreResultSet} objects in a timely manner. {@code SERVER_UNAVAILABLE}, {@code IPC_ERROR}, and {@code DB_ERROR}.

节点.功能描述:
Manages distributed data by device in a distributed system.

To create a {@code DeviceKVStore} database, you can use the {@link data.distributed.common.KVManager.getKvStore(Options, String)} method with {@code KvStoreType} set to {@code DEVICE_COLLABORATION} for the input parameter Options. This database manages distributed data by device, and cannot modify data synchronized from remote devices. When an application writes a key-value pair entry into the database, the system automatically adds the ID of the device running the application to the key.
Obtains the {@code String} value matching a specified device ID and key. {@code SERVER_UNAVAILABLE}, {@code IPC_ERROR}, {@code DB_ERROR}, and {@code KEY_NOT_FOUND}.
注释信息: @param deviceId Indicates the device to be queried.
@param key Indicates the key of the value to be queried.
@returns Returns the value matching the given criteria.
@throws Throws this exception if any of the following errors occurs: {@code INVALID_ARGUMENT},

parameters.说明: Indicates the device to be queried.
Indicates the key of the value to be queried.

节点.return_description: Returns the value matching the given criteria.

节点.功能描述:
Closes the {@code KvStore} database.

Warning: This method is not thread-safe. If you call this method to stop a KvStore database that is running, your thread may crash.

The {@code KvStore} database to close must be an object created by using the {@code getKvStore} method. Before using this method, release the resources created for the database, for example, {@code KvStoreResultSet} for {@code SingleKvStore}, otherwise closing the database will fail. If you are attempting to close a database that is already closed, an error will be returned. occurs:{@code INVALID_ARGUMENT}, {@code SERVER_UNAVAILABLE}, {@code STORE_NOT_OPEN}, {@code STORE_NOT_FOUND}, {@code DB_ERROR}, {@code PERMISSION_DENIED}, and {@code IPC_ERROR}.
注释信息: @param kvStore Indicates the {@code KvStore} database to close.
@throws Throws this exception if any of the following errors

parameters.说明: Indicates the {@code KvStore} database to close.

Before using this method, release the resources created for the database, for example, {@code KvStoreResultSet} for {@code SingleKvStore}, otherwise closing the database will fail. 节点.功能描述:
Deletes the {@code KvStore} database identified by storeId.

Before using this method, close all {@code KvStore} instances in use that are identified by the same storeId.

You can use this method to delete a {@code KvStore} database not in use. After the database is deleted, all its data will be lost. occurs: {@code INVALID_ARGUMENT}, {@code SERVER_UNAVAILABLE}, {@code STORE_NOT_FOUND}, {@code DB_ERROR}, {@code PERMISSION_DENIED}, and {@code IPC_ERROR}.
注释信息: @param storeId Identifies the {@code KvStore} database to delete.
@throws Throws this exception if any of the following errors

parameters.说明: Identifies the {@code KvStore} database to delete.

注释信息: @param storeId Identifies the {@code KvStore} database to delete.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the storeId of all {@code KvStore} databases that are created by using the {@code getKvStore} method and not deleted by calling the {@code deleteKvStore} method. occurs: {@code SERVER_UNAVAILABLE}, {@code DB_ERROR}, {@code PERMISSION_DENIED}, and {@code IPC_ERROR}.
注释信息: @returns Returns the storeId of all created {@code KvStore} databases.
@throws Throws this exception if any of the following errors
节点.return_description: Returns the storeId of all created {@code KvStore} databases.
